title: When AI Radio Starts To Know Your Taste

lines.line: Have you noticed that some AI hosts are starting to feel less random?
Yes. The good ones sound like they know what kind of day you are having.
Exactly. If you always listen to AI products and business technology on your commute, the next episode should not be generic tech news.
It should understand that you care about the product logic behind the story, not just the headline.
